Module com.example.battleship
Package com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util

Class Gradients

java.lang.Object
com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util.Gradients
public final class Gradients extends Object
Utility factory for constructing pre-configured JavaFX LinearGradient paints.

Provides vertical and horizontal color gradients used for rendering metallic vessel hulls, decks, superstructure towers, submarines, and light combatants with depth and lighting effects.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static javafx.scene.paint.LinearGradient
    deck()
    Creates a horizontal metallic linear gradient for deck surfaces.
    static javafx.scene.paint.LinearGradient
    destroyerHull()
    Creates a simplified 3-stop vertical linear gradient for compact vessel hulls such as destroyers and frigates.
    static javafx.scene.paint.LinearGradient
    hull()
    Creates a vertical metallic linear gradient for standard vessel hulls.
    static javafx.scene.paint.LinearGradient
    submarineHull()
    Creates a vertical linear gradient optimized for rounded submarine hulls.
    static javafx.scene.paint.LinearGradient
    tower()
    Creates a vertical linear gradient for superstructure towers and command bridges.

  • Method Details

    • hull

      public static javafx.scene.paint.LinearGradient hull()
      Creates a vertical metallic linear gradient for standard vessel hulls.

      Features a multi-stop color progression transition from top highlights down to lower edge shadows.

      Returns:
      LinearGradient configured for primary ship hulls.

    • deck

      public static javafx.scene.paint.LinearGradient deck()
      Creates a horizontal metallic linear gradient for deck surfaces.

      Transitions horizontally from lighter deck tones to darker shaded deck areas.

      Returns:
      LinearGradient configured for horizontal deck overlays.

    • tower

      public static javafx.scene.paint.LinearGradient tower()
      Creates a vertical linear gradient for superstructure towers and command bridges.

      Simulates downward light decay from roof edges to tower foundations.

      Returns:
      LinearGradient configured for bridge towers.

    • submarineHull

      public static javafx.scene.paint.LinearGradient submarineHull()
      Creates a vertical linear gradient optimized for rounded submarine hulls.

      Fades smoothly from upper hull specular tones into deep aquatic border shadows.

      Returns:
      LinearGradient configured for submarine bodies.

    • destroyerHull

      public static javafx.scene.paint.LinearGradient destroyerHull()
      Creates a simplified 3-stop vertical linear gradient for compact vessel hulls such as destroyers and frigates.
      Returns:
      LinearGradient configured for light combatant hulls.
